ALTS=[{"id":"elev","lbl":"Elevacion","color":"#1d4ed8","char":"\u2191"},{"id":"dep","lbl":"Depresion","color":"#7c3aed","char":"\u2193"},{"id":"inc_d","lbl":"Inclin. D","color":"#0891b2","char":"\u2197"},{"id":"inc_i","lbl":"Inclin. I","color":"#0891b2","char":"\u2196"},{"id":"rot_d","lbl":"Rotacion D","color":"#059669","char":"\u21bb"},{"id":"rot_i","lbl":"Rotacion I","color":"#059669","char":"\u21ba"},{"id":"ant_z","lbl":"Anterioriz.","color":"#d97706","char":"\u2192"},{"id":"post_z","lbl":"Posterioriz.","color":"#b45309","char":"\u2190"},{"id":"valgo","lbl":"Valgo","color":"#dc2626","char":")("},{"id":"varo","lbl":"Varo","color":"#be123c","char":"()"},{"id":"flex","lbl":"Flexion","color":"#9333ea","char":"\u2312"},{"id":"ext","lbl":"Extension","color":"#7e22ce","char":"\u2323"},{"id":"prot","lbl":"Protraccion","color":"#be185d","char":"\u27f9"},{"id":"retr","lbl":"Retraccion","color":"#9d174d","char":"\u27f8"}];var data={wpost_ant:[],wpost_post:[],wpost_latd:[],wpost_lati:[]};var pending=null,dragging=null;var VBS={};function clearPend(){pending=null;document.querySelectorAll('.wpost-ic').forEach(function(x){x.classList.remove('pend');x.style.borderColor='transparent';x.style.background='';});}function posG(cx,cy){var g=document.getElementById('wpost_ghost');g.style.left=cx+'px';g.style.top=cy+'px';}function getAlt(id){for(var i=0;i=r.left&&e.clientX<=r.right&&e.clientY>=r.top&&e.clientY<=r.bottom); });});document.addEventListener('mouseup',function(e){ if(!dragging)return; var alt=dragging.alt;dragging=null; document.getElementById('wpost_ghost').style.display='none'; document.querySelectorAll('.vc2').forEach(function(x){x.classList.remove('over');}); ['wpost_ant','wpost_post','wpost_latd','wpost_lati'].forEach(function(v){ var r=VBS[v].getBoundingClientRect(); if(e.clientX>=r.left&&e.clientX<=r.right&&e.clientY>=r.top&&e.clientY<=r.bottom){ addDrop(v,alt,(e.clientX-r.left)/r.width*100,(e.clientY-r.top)/r.height*100); } });});['wpost_ant','wpost_post','wpost_latd','wpost_lati'].forEach(function(v){ VBS[v].addEventListener('click',function(e){ if(e.target.closest('.wpost-chip'))return; if(!pending)return; var r=this.getBoundingClientRect(); addDrop(v,pending,(e.clientX-r.left)/r.width*100,(e.clientY-r.top)/r.height*100); e.stopPropagation(); });});function addDrop(vista,alt,xp,yp){data[vista].push({altId:alt.id,xp:xp,yp:yp});renderDrops(vista);}function remDrop(vista,idx){data[vista].splice(idx,1);renderDrops(vista);}function renderDrops(vista){ var k=vista.replace('wpost_',''); var layer=document.getElementById('wpost_dl_'+k); layer.innerHTML=''; data[vista].forEach(function(d,idx){ var a=getAlt(d.altId);if(!a)return; var ch=document.createElement('div'); ch.className='wpost-chip';ch.style.background=a.color; ch.style.left=d.xp+'%';ch.style.top=d.yp+'%'; ch.title=a.lbl+' - clic para eliminar';ch.textContent=a.char; (function(v,i){ch.addEventListener('click',function(e){e.stopPropagation();remDrop(v,i);});})(vista,idx); layer.appendChild(ch); });}function renderAllDrops(){['wpost_ant','wpost_post','wpost_latd','wpost_lati'].forEach(renderDrops);} t.classList.add('wpost-ptab-on'); var p=t.dataset.p; var _p0=document.getElementById('wpost_p0');if(_p0)_p0.style.display=p==='0'?'flex':'none'; var _p1=document.getElementById('wpost_p1');if(_p1)_p1.style.display=p==='1'?'flex':'none';});if(document.getElementById('wpost_btn_clr'))document.getElementById('wpost_btn_clr').addEventListener('click',function(){ if(!confirm('Limpiar todos los hallazgos?'))return; data={wpost_ant:[],wpost_post:[],wpost_latd:[],wpost_lati:[]};renderAllDrops();});if(document.getElementById('wpost_btn_exp'))document.getElementById('wpost_btn_exp').addEventListener('click',function(){ var out={vistas:{}}; var VLBL={ant:'Anterior',post:'Posterior',latd:'Lat. D',lati:'Lat. I'}; ['wpost_ant','wpost_post','wpost_latd','wpost_lati'].forEach(function(v){ out.vistas[VLBL[v]]=data[v].map(function(d){ var a=getAlt(d.altId);return{alt:a?a.lbl:d.altId,xp:d.xp,yp:d.yp}; }); }); var blob=new Blob([JSON.stringify(out,null,2)],{type:'application/json;charset=utf-8'}); var a=document.createElement('a');a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob); a.download='evaluacion_postural.json';a.click(); setTimeout(function(){URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href);},2000);}); window.wpostGetData=function(){ if(typeof data==='undefined')return{}; var out={}; ['wpost_ant','wpost_post','wpost_latd','wpost_lati'].forEach(function(v){ var k=v.replace('wpost_',''); out[k]=(data[v]||[]).map(function(d){ var a=getAlt(d.altId);return{alt:a?a.lbl:d.altId,xp:d.xp,yp:d.yp}; }); }); return out;}; window.wpostSetData=function(saved){ if(!saved)return; var map={ant:'wpost_ant',post:'wpost_post',latd:'wpost_latd',lati:'wpost_lati'}; Object.keys(map).forEach(function(k){ var v=map[k]; if(saved[k]&&Array.isArray(saved[k])){ data[v]=saved[k].map(function(d){return{altId:d.altId||d.alt,xp:d.xp,yp:d.yp};}); renderDrops(v); } });}; /* === wpostMount === */ window.wpostMount=function(){ var mount=document.getElementById("wpost_mount"); if(!mount||mount.hasChildNodes()) return; var html=''; html+='
'; html+='
'; html+='

'; html+='
'; html+='

o clic icono + clic imagen

'; ['ant','post'].forEach(function(k){ var lbl=k==='ant'?'Vista Anterior':'Vista Posterior'; html+='
'; html+='
'+lbl+'
'; html+='
'; html+=''; html+='
'; html+='

'; mount.innerHTML=html; data={wpost_ant:[],wpost_post:[],wpost_latd:[],wpost_lati:[]}; pending=null; dragging=null; VBS={}; ['ant','post','latd','lati'].forEach(function(k){ var img=document.getElementById('wpost_img_'+k); var vb =document.getElementById('wpost_vb_'+k); if(img) img.src=IMGS['wpost_'+k]; if(vb) VBS['wpost_'+k]=vb; }); document.getElementById('wpost_pts').addEventListener('click',function(e){ var t=e.target.closest('.wpost-ptab'); if(!t) return; document.querySelectorAll('.wpost-ptab').forEach(function(x){x.classList.remove('wpost-ptab-on');}); t.classList.add('wpost-ptab-on'); var p=t.dataset.p; document.getElementById('wpost_p0').style.display=p==='0'?'flex':'none'; document.getElementById('wpost_p1').style.display=p==='1'?'flex':'none'; }); var ig=document.getElementById('wpost_ig'); ig.innerHTML=''; ALTS.forEach(function(a){ var c=document.createElement('div'); c.className='wpost-ic'; c.dataset.id=a.id; c.innerHTML=''+a.char+'' +''+a.lbl+''; c.addEventListener('mousedown',function(e){ if(e.button!==0) return; e.preventDefault(); clearPend(); dragging={alt:a}; var g=document.getElementById('wpost_ghost'); if(g){ g.style.background=a.color; g.innerHTML=''+a.char+''+a.lbl+''; g.style.display='flex'; posG(e.clientX,e.clientY); } }); c.addEventListener('click',function(e){ e.stopPropagation(); if(pending&&pending.id===a.id){ clearPend(); } else{ pending=a; document.querySelectorAll('.wpost-ic').forEach(function(x){ if(x.dataset.id===a.id){ x.classList.add('wpost-ic-pend'); x.style.borderColor=a.color; x.style.background=a.color+'22'; } else{ x.classList.remove('wpost-ic-pend'); x.style.borderColor='transparent'; x.style.background=''; } }); } }); ig.appendChild(c); }); if(window._wpostPending){ try{ wpostSetData(typeof window._wpostPending==='string'?JSON.parse(window._wpostPending):window._wpostPending); }catch(e){} window._wpostPending=null; } if(window._wpostPendingObs){ var ta=document.getElementById('obsInspeccionVisual'); if(ta) ta.value=window._wpostPendingObs; window._wpostPendingObs=null; } }; })();
